task_params.subject: Next Month's Potluck + Art Table Idea
message_points: Write in both English and Spanish
Next month's potluck theme is tamales and toppings
Invite volunteers to bring a side dish or dessert
Art table idea is a simple watercolor postcard station
Ask who can help set up and clean up
Keep the tone warm and welcoming

arguments.subject: Next Month's Potluck + Art Table Idea

attributes.subject: Volunteer sign-up sheet for this month's lunch
attributes.body: Hi everyone, please review the sign-up sheet and let me know if you can help with setup, serving, or cleanup. Thanks for all you do.

attributes.subject: Craft corner supplies update
attributes.body: We still have watercolor paper, brushes, and a few table covers left from the last activity. Let me know if you want me to bring them out.

attributes.subject: Reminder: cultural activity ideas
attributes.body: Please send ideas for future cultural and art activities for the center. Bilingual activities are especially welcome.
